# skilltap

> CLI tool for installing agent skills (SKILL.md files) from any git host, npm registry, or
> curated tap. "Homebrew taps for AI agent skills." Agent-agnostic — installs to
> ~/.agents/skills/ with automatic symlinks for each agent (Claude Code, Cursor, Codex, Gemini,
> Windsurf). One command, any source, any agent.

skilltap scans every install for security issues (invisible Unicode, hidden HTML, obfuscated
code, suspicious URLs, tag injection) before anything lands on disk. An optional semantic
scan sends skill content to your local AI agent CLI for intent review.

## Guide

- [What is skilltap?](https://skilltap.dev/guide/what-is-skilltap): Overview, how it works, and what it is not
- [Getting Started](https://skilltap.dev/guide/getting-started): Install skilltap and add your first skill in minutes
- [Installation](https://skilltap.dev/guide/installation): All install methods — curl, npm, Bun, and binary download
- [Installing Skills](https://skilltap.dev/guide/installing-skills): Git URLs, npm, SSH, tap names, scopes, agent symlinks, and all flags
- [Creating Skills](https://skilltap.dev/guide/creating-skills): Scaffold, author, verify, and publish a SKILL.md skill
- [Taps](https://skilltap.dev/guide/taps): Create and manage skill registries (taps) for discoverability
- [Security](https://skilltap.dev/guide/security): Two-layer scan model, threat model, semantic scan, agent mode security
- [Configuration](https://skilltap.dev/guide/configuration): config.toml reference, default scope, scan level, agent mode
- [Doctor](https://skilltap.dev/guide/doctor): Environment, config, and state health checks with auto-repair
- [Shell Completions](https://skilltap.dev/guide/shell-completions): bash, zsh, and fish completion setup

## Reference

- [CLI Commands](https://skilltap.dev/reference/cli): Complete reference for all commands, flags, prompt behavior, and exit codes
- [SKILL.md Format](https://skilltap.dev/reference/skill-format): SKILL.md frontmatter schema, required fields, and constraints
- [tap.json Format](https://skilltap.dev/reference/tap-format): tap.json schema for skill registries
- [Config Options](https://skilltap.dev/reference/config-options): All config.toml keys with types, defaults, and examples

## Optional

- [GitHub Repository](https://github.com/nklisch/skilltap): Source code, issues, releases, and contributing
- [Official tap](https://github.com/nklisch/skilltap-skills): The `skilltap` tap — install the `skilltap` skill (manage skills) and `skilltap-find` skill (discover skills) via `skilltap tap add skilltap https://github.com/nklisch/skilltap-skills`
- [Full documentation (single file)](https://skilltap.dev/llms-full.txt): All pages concatenated as Markdown for bulk ingestion
